title: "Ubuntu one no longer syncing on my 10.04 laptop"
date: 2013-06-13
forum: General Help

### Post by David Batty on 2013-06-13
files I drop into the ubuntu one folder have a lock on the icon[IMG]http://ubuntuforums.org/;base64,[/IMG] and don't upload to the cloud. I can save the file to non sync folders OK & i can upload them through thunderbird, or from my desktop. any ideas?

---

### Post by ahallubuntu on 2013-06-13
~

---

### Post by Irihapeti on 2013-06-13
This question has already come up. More about it here: [http://ubuntuforums.org/showthread.php?t=2150538](http://ubuntuforums.org/showthread.php?t=2150538)

The short answer is that you need to upgrade.

---

### Post by David Batty on 2013-06-13
Thanks, looks like it's time to change distro's, I'm using mint on my desktop and getting used to it. This laptop is old so i need a lightweight distro or i'll keep 10.04 and upload via thunderbird.

---

### Post by Irihapeti on 2013-06-13
If you keep 10.04, the problem is that you don't get security updates, either. Also, you find fewer and fewer people able to help with problems as time goes on.

Unless your laptop is super old, you may be able to run Xubuntu or Lubuntu.

---
